title: Fresh Breaths
description: Give your Minecraft the new fresh feeling it deserves.
body:
<details>
<summary>📢 A Quick Heads Up</summary>
This Modpack was originally made for a private server with some friends. Some mods are focused on multiplayer, so you maybe want to disable or tweak mods if you're playing solo. Most Launchers make it very easy to turn off mods you don't want.
</details>

## **✨Experience Minecraft, Fresh**

**Fresh Breaths** is a modpack designed to break the cycle of starting the same new world _over and over_ again. With carefully curated mods that blend naturally with vanilla, every playthorugh feels **fresh, unique, and exciting**, without overwhelming players new to modding.

### A little insight
- 🌎 **World Variety**: New biomes, overhauled villages, and new structures waiting to be explored
- ⚒️ **Vanilla-Friendly**: Items and tools that feel like they belong
- ⚡ **Quality-Of-Life Tweaks**: Small additions that make the game smoother
- 🎮 **Multiplayer Ready**: Built with adventures with friends in mind, but is just as fun solo aswell
